summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Awadhut Banquets & Catering web application. Backend APIs working well with 80% success rate. Frontend UI and navigation working properly. Admin dashboard fully functional with JWT authentication.

minor_bugs.issue: CREATE endpoints return 200 instead of 201 status code
minor_bugs.impact: Functional but incorrect HTTP status codes

ui_bugs.issue: Call button exists but may not be fully visible

navigation_issues.issue: Pages load but may not have proper data-testid attributes for testing

integration_issues.flow: Event type dropdown in booking form
integration_issues.issue: Dropdown options sometimes not clickable due to overlay

passed_tests: All GET endpoints return correct data
Reviews API with 6 reviews (5 approved, 1 pending)
Homepage loads with all sections (hero, services, packages, gallery, testimonials)
Package tabs filtering (All, Wedding, Food, Corporate)
WhatsApp floating button visible and working
Booking form can be filled with all required fields
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: 1) Update CREATE endpoints to return 201 status codes instead of 200, 2) Ensure Call floating button is fully visible, 3) Add data-testid attributes to About, Services, Reviews pages for better testing, 4) Fix dropdown overlay issues in booking form

success_percentage.backend: 80% (16/20 tests passed - minor status code issues)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (Most UI components working, minor visibility and navigation issues)
